calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610); after hearing, Register of Action reflects dismissal entire action filed. Written order not issued; Case off calendar as dismissal on file.
